mapper.select: SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType ORDER BY typeName ASC, resourceTypeId ASC
SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY typeName ASC, resourceTypeId ASC
SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY typeName ASC, resourceTypeId ASC
SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType WHERE resourceTypeId = #{resourceTypeId}
SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType WHERE LOWER(typeName) = LOWER(#{typeName}) AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY resourceTypeId ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT resourceTypeId, typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM resourceType WHERE LOWER(typeName) = LOWER(#{typeName}) ORDER BY resourceTypeId ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resourceType WHERE LOWER(TRIM(typeName)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{typeName}))
AND resourceTypeId != #{excludedResourceTypeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resourceType ( typeName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt ) VALUES ( #{typeName}, #{status}, #{usageCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE resourceType rt SET rt.usageCount = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource r WHERE r.resourceTypeId = rt.resourceTypeId ) WHERE rt.resourceTypeId = #{resourceTypeId}
